gmail_draft_payload.subject: Marketing Proposal for Glossier
gmail_draft_payload.body:
Marketing Proposal for Glossier

## Executive Summary
Glossier has strong brand demand and community trust, but paid social execution has been inconsistent. This proposal addresses that gap with a profitable 90-day scaling plan from roughly $180K toward $400K monthly revenue.

## Scope of Services
Paid social strategy and media buying, creative testing framework, CRO coordination, and retention alignment across email/SMS with weekly reporting.

## Strategy and Approach
Execute trust-first Meta creative, rapid iteration cycles, and funnel optimization while preserving brand voice. Prioritize profitable scaling and tighter acquisition-to-retention handoff.

## Budget and Pricing
Start with approximately $20K paid media test budget and phase service scope by milestone performance, with scale contingent on CAC and ROAS guardrails.

## Terms and Conditions
Work begins after written approval. Founder signs off on final strategy direction, communication cadence is weekly, and revision loops remain tied to the same case_id for auditability.
